de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang

Interface Contract

  • All Superinterfaces:
    SpecificationElement
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    DependencyContract, FunctionalOperationContract, InformationFlowContract, OperationContract
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    BlockWellDefinedness, ClassWellDefinedness, DependencyContractImpl, FunctionalAuxiliaryContract, FunctionalBlockContract, FunctionalLoopContract, FunctionalOperationContractImpl, InformationFlowContractImpl, LoopWellDefinedness, MethodWellDefinedness, StatementWellDefinedness, WellDefinednessCheck

    public interface Contract
extends SpecificationElement
    A contractual agreement about an ObserverFunction.

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Interface and Description
      static class  Contract.OriginalVariables
      Class for storing the original variables without always distinguishing several different cases depending on which variables are present/needed in order to provide a general interface.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static int INVALID_ID 

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Default Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      ContractPO createProofObl(InitConfig initConfig)
      Returns a proof obligation to the passed initConfig.
      ProofOblInput createProofObl(InitConfig initConfig, Contract contract)
      Returns a proof obligation to the passed contract and initConfig.
      ProofOblInput createProofObl(InitConfig initConfig, Contract contract, boolean supportSymbolicExecutionAPI)
      Returns a proof obligation to the passed contract and initConfig.
      Term getAccessible(ProgramVariable heap) 
      Term getAssignable(LocationVariable heap) 
      Term getDep(LocationVariable heap, boolean atPre, ProgramVariable selfVar, ImmutableList<ProgramVariable> paramVars, java.util.Map<LocationVariable,? extends ProgramVariable> atPreVars, Services services)
      Returns the dependency set of the contract.
      Term getDep(LocationVariable heap, boolean atPre, Term heapTerm, Term selfTerm, ImmutableList<Term> paramTerms, java.util.Map<LocationVariable,Term> atPres, Services services)
      Returns the dependency set of the contract.
      Term getGlobalDefs() 
      Term getGlobalDefs(LocationVariable heap, Term heapTerm, Term selfTerm, ImmutableList<Term> paramTerms, Services services) 
      java.lang.String getHTMLText(Services services)
      Returns the contract in pretty HTML format.
      Term getMby() 
      Term getMby(java.util.Map<LocationVariable,Term> heapTerms, Term selfTerm, ImmutableList<Term> paramTerms, java.util.Map<LocationVariable,Term> atPres, Services services)
      Returns the measured_by clause of the contract.
      Term getMby(ProgramVariable selfVar, ImmutableList<ProgramVariable> paramVars, Services services)
      Returns the measured_by clause of the contract.
      Contract.OriginalVariables getOrigVars()
      Returns the original ProgramVariables to replace them easier.
      java.lang.String getPlainText(Services services)
      Returns the contract in pretty plain text format.
      Term getPre(java.util.List<LocationVariable> heapContext, java.util.Map<LocationVariable,Term> heapTerms, Term selfTerm, ImmutableList<Term> paramTerms, java.util.Map<LocationVariable,Term> atPres, Services services)
      Returns the precondition of the contract.
      Term getPre(java.util.List<LocationVariable> heapContext, ProgramVariable selfVar, ImmutableList<ProgramVariable> paramVars, java.util.Map<LocationVariable,? extends ProgramVariable> atPreVars, Services services)
      Returns the precondition of the contract.
      Term getPre(LocationVariable heap, ProgramVariable selfVar, ImmutableList<ProgramVariable> paramVars, java.util.Map<LocationVariable,? extends ProgramVariable> atPreVars, Services services)
      Returns the precondition of the contract.
      Term getPre(LocationVariable heap, Term heapTerm, Term selfTerm, ImmutableList<Term> paramTerms, java.util.Map<LocationVariable,Term> atPres, Services services)
      Returns the precondition of the contract.
      ProofOblInput getProofObl(Services services)
      Lookup the proof obligation belonging to the contract in the specification repository.
      Term getRequires(LocationVariable heap) 
      IObserverFunction getTarget()
      Returns the contracted function symbol.
      java.lang.String getTypeName()
      Returns technical name for the contract type.
      boolean hasMby()
      Tells whether the contract contains a measured_by clause.
      boolean hasSelfVar()
      Checks if a self variable is originally provided.
      int id()
      Returns the id number of the contract.
      default boolean isAuxiliary() 
      Contract map(java.util.function.UnaryOperator<Term> op, Services services)
      Applies a unary operator to every term in this specification element.
      java.lang.String proofToString(Services services)
      Returns a parseable String representation of the contract.
      Contract setID(int newId)
      Returns a contract which is identical this contract except that the id is set to the new id.
      Contract setTarget(KeYJavaType newKJT, IObserverFunction newPM)
      Returns a contract which is identical to this contract except that the KeYJavaType and IObserverFunction are set to the new values.
      boolean toBeSaved()
      Tells whether, on saving a proof where this contract is available, the contract should be saved too.
      boolean transactionApplicableContract() 

      • Methods inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.SpecificationElement

        getDisplayName, getKJT, getName, getVisibility

    • Field Detail

      • INVALID_ID

        static final int INVALID_ID
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

    • Method Detail

      • isAuxiliary

        default boolean isAuxiliary()
        Returns:
        true if any only if this contract does not necessarily need to be proven in its own proof obligation. E.g., this is true for FunctionalBlockContracts and FunctionalLoopContracts.

      • id

        int id()
        Returns the id number of the contract. If a contract has instances for several methods (inheritance!), all instances have the same id. The id is either non-negative or equal to INVALID_ID.

      • getTarget

        IObserverFunction getTarget()
        Returns the contracted function symbol.

      • hasMby

        boolean hasMby()
        Tells whether the contract contains a measured_by clause.

      • getOrigVars

        Contract.OriginalVariables getOrigVars()
        Returns the original ProgramVariables to replace them easier. The second list consists of the parameters.

      • getPre

        Term getPre(LocationVariable heap,
            ProgramVariable selfVar,
            ImmutableList<ProgramVariable> paramVars,
            java.util.Map<LocationVariable,? extends ProgramVariable> atPreVars,
            Services services)
        Returns the precondition of the contract.
        Parameters:
        heap - heap variable
        selfVar - self variable
        paramVars - parameter variables
        atPreVars - variables at previous heap
        services - services object
        Returns:
        precondition

      • getPre

        Term getPre(java.util.List<LocationVariable> heapContext,
            ProgramVariable selfVar,
            ImmutableList<ProgramVariable> paramVars,
            java.util.Map<LocationVariable,? extends ProgramVariable> atPreVars,
            Services services)
        Returns the precondition of the contract.
        Parameters:
        heapContext - heap context
        selfVar - self variable
        paramVars - parameter variables
        atPreVars - variables at previous heap
        services - services object
        Returns:
        precondition

      • getPre

        Term getPre(LocationVariable heap,
            Term heapTerm,
            Term selfTerm,
            ImmutableList<Term> paramTerms,
            java.util.Map<LocationVariable,Term> atPres,
            Services services)
        Returns the precondition of the contract.
        Parameters:
        heap - heap variable
        heapTerm - heap term
        selfTerm - self term
        paramTerms - parameter terms
        atPres - terms of variables at previous heap
        services - services object
        Returns:
        the precondition

      • getPre

        Term getPre(java.util.List<LocationVariable> heapContext,
            java.util.Map<LocationVariable,Term> heapTerms,
            Term selfTerm,
            ImmutableList<Term> paramTerms,
            java.util.Map<LocationVariable,Term> atPres,
            Services services)
        Returns the precondition of the contract.
        Parameters:
        heapContext - heap context
        heapTerms - heap terms
        selfTerm - term of self variable
        paramTerms - terms of parameter variables
        atPres - terms of variables at previous heap
        services - services object
        Returns:
        the precondition

      • getDep

        Term getDep(LocationVariable heap,
            boolean atPre,
            ProgramVariable selfVar,
            ImmutableList<ProgramVariable> paramVars,
            java.util.Map<LocationVariable,? extends ProgramVariable> atPreVars,
            Services services)
        Returns the dependency set of the contract.
        Parameters:
        heap - the heap variable
        atPre - boolean whether old heap should be used
        selfVar - self variable
        paramVars - parameter variables
        atPreVars - variables at previous heap
        services - services object
        Returns:
        the dependency set

      • getDep

        Term getDep(LocationVariable heap,
            boolean atPre,
            Term heapTerm,
            Term selfTerm,
            ImmutableList<Term> paramTerms,
            java.util.Map<LocationVariable,Term> atPres,
            Services services)
        Returns the dependency set of the contract.
        Parameters:
        heap - the heap variable
        atPre - boolean whether old heap should be used
        heapTerm - the heap variable term
        selfTerm - term of self variable
        paramTerms - terms of parameter variables
        atPres - terms of variables at previous heap
        services - services object
        Returns:
        the dependency set

      • getRequires

        Term getRequires(LocationVariable heap)

        Term getAssignable(LocationVariable heap)

      • getAccessible

        Term getAccessible(ProgramVariable heap)

        Term getGlobalDefs()

        Term getGlobalDefs(LocationVariable heap,
                   Term heapTerm,
                   Term selfTerm,
                   ImmutableList<Term> paramTerms,
                   Services services)

      • getMby

        Term getMby()

      • getMby

        Term getMby(ProgramVariable selfVar,
            ImmutableList<ProgramVariable> paramVars,
            Services services)
        Returns the measured_by clause of the contract.
        Parameters:
        selfVar - the self variable
        paramVars - the parameter variables
        services - services object
        Returns:
        the measured-by term

      • getMby

        Term getMby(java.util.Map<LocationVariable,Term> heapTerms,
            Term selfTerm,
            ImmutableList<Term> paramTerms,
            java.util.Map<LocationVariable,Term> atPres,
            Services services)
        Returns the measured_by clause of the contract.
        Parameters:
        heapTerms - terms for the heap context
        selfTerm - term of self variable
        paramTerms - terms of parameter variables
        atPres - terms of variables at previous heap
        services - services object
        Returns:
        the measured-by term

      • getHTMLText

        java.lang.String getHTMLText(Services services)
        Returns the contract in pretty HTML format.
        Parameters:
        services - services instance
        Returns:
        the html representation

      • getPlainText

        java.lang.String getPlainText(Services services)
        Returns the contract in pretty plain text format.
        Parameters:
        services - services instance
        Returns:
        the plain text representation

      • toBeSaved

        boolean toBeSaved()
        Tells whether, on saving a proof where this contract is available, the contract should be saved too. (this is currently true for contracts specified directly in DL, but not for JML contracts)
        Returns:
        see above

      • transactionApplicableContract

        boolean transactionApplicableContract()

      • proofToString

        java.lang.String proofToString(Services services)
        Returns a parseable String representation of the contract. Precondition: toBeSaved() must be true.
        Parameters:
        services - the services instance
        Returns:
        the (parseable) String representation

      • createProofObl

        ContractPO createProofObl(InitConfig initConfig)
        Returns a proof obligation to the passed initConfig.
        Parameters:
        initConfig - the initial configuration
        Returns:
        the proof obligation

      • getProofObl

        ProofOblInput getProofObl(Services services)
        Lookup the proof obligation belonging to the contract in the specification repository.
        Parameters:
        services - the services instance
        Returns:
        the proof obligation according to the specification repository

      • createProofObl

        ProofOblInput createProofObl(InitConfig initConfig,
                             Contract contract)
        Returns a proof obligation to the passed contract and initConfig.
        Parameters:
        initConfig - the initial configuration
        contract - the contract
        Returns:
        the proof obligation

      • createProofObl

        ProofOblInput createProofObl(InitConfig initConfig,
                             Contract contract,
                             boolean supportSymbolicExecutionAPI)
        Returns a proof obligation to the passed contract and initConfig.
        Parameters:
        initConfig - the initial configuration
        contract - the contract
        supportSymbolicExecutionAPI - boolean saying whether symbolic execution api is supported
        Returns:
        the proof obligation

      • setID

        Contract setID(int newId)
        Returns a contract which is identical this contract except that the id is set to the new id.
        Parameters:
        newId - the new id value
        Returns:
        an identical contract with the new id

      • setTarget

        Contract setTarget(KeYJavaType newKJT,
                   IObserverFunction newPM)
        Returns a contract which is identical to this contract except that the KeYJavaType and IObserverFunction are set to the new values.
        Parameters:
        newKJT - the new KeYJavaType
        newPM - the new observer function
        Returns:
        an identical contract with the new KJT and PM (see above)

      • getTypeName

        java.lang.String getTypeName()
        Returns technical name for the contract type.
        Returns:
        the technical name

      • hasSelfVar

        boolean hasSelfVar()
        Checks if a self variable is originally provided.
        Returns:
        true self variable is originally provided, false no self variable available.

      • map

        Contract map(java.util.function.UnaryOperator<Term> op,
             Services services)
        Description copied from interface: SpecificationElement
        Applies a unary operator to every term in this specification element.
        Specified by:
        map in interface SpecificationElement
        Parameters:
        op - the operator to apply.
        services - services.
        Returns:
        this specification element with the operator applied.
